title: Otyacraft Engine
body:
![logo](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/358878159615164416/946743846593765386/logo.png)
# Otyacraft Engine

Library mod used by Team FelNull.  
Includes a library useful for mod development.  


# Developer
It is not supposed to be used by anyone other than FelNull developers, but it can be used.
